example: Please follow the instructions carefully.
The online lesson was very interactive and engaging.
The lesson plan requires some adaptation for younger students.
Staging your tasks helps keep students on track.
We started the project with a brainstorming session.
ja: ブレインストーミング

example: Please keep your explanation concise and clear.
The instructions were straightforward and easy to follow.
zh: 直接了當的，簡單明瞭的

example: She gave verbal instructions before the activity started.
The teacher gave a demonstration of the experiment.
ja: 実演、デモンストレーション

example: Use ICQs to check students' understanding.
zh: 理解檢查問題（Instruction Checking Questions）
ja: 理解確認質問（Instruction Checking Questions）

example: Students wrote their answers using the annotated function.
Students can self-check their answers after the quiz.
Using gestures can help convey meaning in communication.
Students used reaction buttons on Zoom to answer questions.
It's helpful to script your lessons before teaching.
zh: 劇本，腳本；預先寫好講稿

example: She delivered the message clearly to the audience.
The intended meaning was clear after the explanation.
Our teaching toolkit includes many useful resources.
I wish you a prosperous and successful career.
The meeting was fruitful and productive.
